messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration. We are currently 80% complete and everything is progressing smoothly. The project remains on track for delivery this Friday.

I'll keep you posted as we approach completion. Let me know if you have any questions or concerns.

Best regards

content.delta: The email has been sent successfully to **alice@example.com** with the subject **"Project Update"**. The body summarizes that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.
